controls.control_name: Ensure 'Secure transfer required' is enabled on storage accounts
Ensure storage account shared key access is disabled
Ensure public access is disabled on all storage accounts
Ensure SQL Servers do not have a public endpoint
Ensure SSH access is restricted from the internet
Ensure RDP access is restricted from the internet
Ensure Security Defaults are enabled on Azure Active Directory
Ensure MFA is enabled for all privileged users
Ensure OS disk encryption is enabled for virtual machines
Ensure Key Vault audit logging is enabled
Ensure purge protection is enabled on Key Vaults
Ensure service principal credentials are reviewed regularly
Ensure App Service Authentication is enabled for Azure App Service
